ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund, reversal) */,
  "payer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payer */,
  "payee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payee */,
  "org_txn_id" TEXT /* Original transaction ID */,
  "org_txn_date" TEXT /* Date of the original transaction */,
  "org_rrn" TEXT /* Retrieval Reference Number of the original transaction */,
  "initiator_psp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiating payment service provider */,
  "beneficiary_bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary bank */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "processing_fee" TEXT /* Processing fee for the transaction */,
  "tax_deducted" TEXT /* Tax deducted from the transaction */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Refund amount in case of a refund transaction */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_initiator_psp_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_psp_id") REFERENCES payment_service_providers ("psp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payee_id FOREIGN KEY ("payee_id") REFERENCES payees ("payee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payer_id FOREIGN KEY ("payer_id") REFERENCES payers ("payer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_beneficiary_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_bank_id") REFERENCES beneficiary_banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payers" (
  "payer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payer */,
  "payer_name" TEXT /* Name of the payer */,
  "payer_account" TEXT /* Account information of the payer */,
  "payer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the payer */,
  "payer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the payer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the payer */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the payer (e.g., social security number, passport number) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payees" (
  "payee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payee */,
  "payee_name" TEXT /* Name of the payee */,
  "payee_account" TEXT /* Account information of the payee */,
  "payee_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the payee */,
  "payee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the payee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the payee */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the payee (e.g., social security number, passport number) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_service_providers" (
  "psp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment service provider */,
  "psp_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment service provider */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the payment service provider */,
  "supported_features" TEXT /* Features supported by the payment service provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the payment service provider */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* Currencies supported by the payment service provider */,
  "fee_structure" TEXT /* Fee structure of the payment service provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment service provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment service provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "ifsc_code" TEXT /* IFSC code of the bank */,
  "supported_versions" TEXT /* Versions supported by the bank */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the bank */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Branch code of the bank */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) at the bank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bank was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bank was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, compliance officer, financial analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance rule */,
  "rule_category" TEXT /* Category of the compliance rule (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "rule_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance rule (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "rule_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the compliance rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being checked */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance rule being applied */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_comment" TEXT /* Comments or remarks related to the compliance check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance check was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_compliance_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_compliance_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES compliance_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the notification is related to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., success, failure, warning) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
